steps.title: <ui-icon name="map"></ui-icon> View Switcher & Gestures
steps.text: Toggle between Tree, Graph, Board, and Timeline views. Pro-Tips: Drag and drop rows in the Tree view to easily change parent-child relationships! Also, Ctrl/Cmd+click items in Tree or Timeline for Bulk Edit.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="search"></ui-icon> Advanced Filters
steps.text: Search work items by text or ID, sort rows, or instantly filter the entire layout by Sprints, States, Assignees, and Tags.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="star"></ui-icon> Filter Followed Items
steps.text: Click the star icon in the split filter button to instantly filter the tree, graph, board, or timeline to show only the items you are currently following.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="undo"></ui-icon> Undo & Redo
steps.text: Easily revert (Ctrl+Z) or redo (Ctrl+Y) layout adjustments, re-parenting, or status updates with a click.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="settings"></ui-icon> Display & Settings
steps.text: Access settings to adjust UI scale, cycle themes, set timezones, configure emojis, or update your Azure DevOps connection.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="moon"></ui-icon> Theme Switcher
steps.text: Cycle between Light, Dark, or System Sync theme options.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="search"></ui-icon> UI Scaling
steps.text: Adjust the overall font and interface scaling factor for high-resolution displays.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="clock"></ui-icon> Auto-Refresh
steps.text: Set the interval for automatic background updates from Azure DevOps, or turn it off.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="globe"></ui-icon> Timezone Config
steps.text: Configure the timezone used for active-time calculations and work-hours constraints.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="clock"></ui-icon> Work Hours
steps.text: Define your active working hours window used for calculating business seconds and timespans.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="bell"></ui-icon> Notifications & Mentions
steps.text: Toggle desktop alerts for Followed Items and User Mentions, and define the maximum age threshold (e.g. 2 days) to filter out older historic changes.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="layout"></ui-icon> Customize Layout
steps.text: Reorder, pin, or show/hide toolbar buttons, columns, and work item detail fields.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="smile"></ui-icon> Custom Reactions
steps.text: Customize the emojis, icons, or images used for comments and work item activity reactions.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="key"></ui-icon> DevOps Connection
steps.text: Manage your organization URL, project name, PAT token, or OAuth credentials.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="arrow-up"></ui-icon> Parent Navigation
steps.text: Click this arrow to navigate directly to the Parent Work Item without leaving your current board view.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="paperclip"></ui-icon> File Attachments
steps.text: Quickly upload attachments! Drop or paste screenshots directly into descriptions, or use this clip button.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="settings"></ui-icon> Customize Panel
steps.text: Reorder or hide detail fields on this panel. Custom layouts are saved per work item type.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="link"></ui-icon> ADO Link & Navigation
steps.text: Copy the item's direct URL to your clipboard, or jump straight to the Azure DevOps webpage.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="maximize"></ui-icon> Fullscreen Editor
steps.text: Need space? Toggle Fullscreen Mode for distraction-free description writing and reading.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="star"></ui-icon> Local Subscriptions (Follow)
steps.text: Subscribe to this work item to track its updates. Note: This is a local feature of ADO Atlas. It monitors revisions and triggers desktop notifications, but does not register you as a follower on the ADO server and will not trigger ADO email notifications.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="copy"></ui-icon> Dynamic Fields
steps.text: Title, State, Assigned, and custom fields are fetched directly from ADO and adapt per item type.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="trending-up"></ui-icon> Activity & Time-in-State
steps.text: Expand this section to analyze duration metrics, state transition times, and comments.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="message-square"></ui-icon> Activity Actions
steps.text: Create a Child task, post markdown-formatted comments, or toggle fullscreen discussion view.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="plus"></ui-icon> Adding Fields & Groups
steps.text: Click Add Field to build your query. Add fields to the current group (AND / OR logic) or add nested groups for complex conditions.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="settings"></ui-icon> Operators & Values
steps.text: Click the operator chip (e.g. =) to flip it (to <>, CONTAINS, UNDER, etc.). Then, select or type your value in the input field.

steps.title: <ui-icon name="sparkles"></ui-icon> Special Macros
steps.text:
Use macros to create dynamic filters!
@me Matches your currently logged-in user
@empty Matches items where the field is blank
